steps.title: Treat a over b as one quantity
steps.content: The first equation gives $\frac{4a}{b}=6.7$, so divide by $4$: $$\frac{a}{b}=\frac{6.7}{4}=1.675$$

steps.title: Substitute into the second equation
steps.content: Rewrite the second equation as $$\frac{a}{bn}=\frac{a}{b}\cdot\frac{1}{n}=26.8$$ Substitute $\frac{a}{b}=1.675$: $$\frac{1.675}{n}=26.8$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content: $$1.675=26.8n$$ $$n=\frac{1.675}{26.8}=0.0625$$ This also means $\frac{1}{n}=16$, which makes $1.675\cdot 16=26.8$. The grid-in answer can be .0625, 0.0625, or 1/16.
